title: ChairSittin
description: A plugin which lets you sit on stairs, to let people sit at tables!
body:
# ChairSittin Transform ordinary stair blocks into comfortable seating for your Minecraft server! This lightweight yet powerful plugin enhances player experience by adding functional chairs without requiring custom resource packs or complex furniture plugins. ## Features ✅ **Simple Interaction** - Right-click on any stair block to sit down ✅ **Immersive Experience** - Players automatically face the correct direction based on stair orientation ✅ **Full Protection** - Players cannot move while seated, preventing glitches and exploits ✅ **Multiple Exit Options** - Stand up via command or by sneaking ✅ **Highly Configurable** - Adjust seat height, position, messages, and more ✅ **World Filtering** - Enable or disable the plugin in specific worlds ✅ **Minimal Resource Usage** - Optimized code with negligible server impact ## Why Choose This Plugin? Looking for realistic seating without the complexity of furniture plugins? ChairSittin offers a perfect balance of simplicity and functionality. While other solutions may require resource packs or complex setups, our plugin works instantly with vanilla Minecraft stairs. Server owners love how it enhances roleplay and social gatherings without adding lag or compatibility issues. With detailed configuration options, you can fine-tune the sitting experience to match your server's unique style. Whether you're building a medieval tavern, modern café, or cozy home, this plugin adds that final touch of immersion that keeps players engaged and impressed! ## Commands - `/chairsittin standup` - Stand up from your current seat - `/chairsittin reload` - Reload the plugin configuration Make your server more immersive today with this essential quality-of-life enhancement!
